channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-17595] sanity test_230p: dir merge not finished (want 'crush,fixed' got 'crush,migrating,fixed')
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Arshad <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/794ee976-d09e-44eb-86a2-62ab7fdc96cc

test_230p failed with the following error:

dir merge not finished
Update not seen after 100s: want 'crush,fixed' got 'crush,migrating,fixed'
 sanity test_230p: @@@@@@ FAIL: dir merge not finished 
  Trace dump:
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6947:error()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:22735:test_230p()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7287:run_one()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7347:run_one_logged()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7173:run_test()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:22744:main()

MDS

[29593.659021] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark == sanity test 230p: dir merge =========================== 11:21:55 \(1709205715\) 
[29594.186815] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity test 230p: dir merge =========================== 11:21:55 (1709205715) 
[29594.621760] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl set_param lod.*.mdt_hash=crush 
[29595.272951] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.*MDT0000.enable_dir_restripe [29595.940188] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdt.*.enable_dir_restripe=1 
[29607.446694] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdt.*.md_stats=clear >/dev/null [29659.065346] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: lctl get_param -n mdt.*MDT*.md_stats
 [29659.969090] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdt.*.md_stats=clear >/dev/null [29696.997210] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: lctl get_param -n mdt.*MDT*.md_stats
 [29697.504751] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdt.*.md_stats=clear >/dev/null [29799.905410] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark sanity test_230p: @@@@@@ FAIL: dir merge not finished 
[29800.262671] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: sanity test_230p: @@@@@@ FAIL: dir merge not finished

 

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/102652 - 4.18.0-477.27.1.el8_8.aarch64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/102652 - 4.18.0-477.27.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity test_230p - dir merge not finished
item.summary: sanity test_230p: dir merge not finished (want 'crush,fixed' got 'crush,migrating,fixed')

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
